title: fees::select_notes and CoinSelectError are dead pub API; production path uses tx_builder
description: fees::select_notes (takes &[Note]) and fees::CoinSelectError are exported as pub but are never called from any production code path. All production payments go through tx_builder::select_with_fee / select_notes_spendable (takes &[SpendableNote]). The dead pub items leak an interface that (a) external crates could depend on, locking the API, and (b) operates on Note (without witness_data), so any caller that uses it bypasses the witness-aware selection path. Should be pub(crate) or removed. Related: nie-14sh.54 tracks the duplication angle.
